product_overview: Wameed POS is a Saudi-first, multi-tenant point-of-sale platform for store owners, managers, cashiers, and kitchen staff. It combines offline-capable sales, inventory, orders, reporting, and localization features in one Arabic-first system.
core_goals: Complete sales at the point of sale with fast product lookup, cart management, and payment collection.
Manage products, categories, suppliers, and inventory operations from a unified back-office experience.
Track orders, customers, staff, and financial activity across day-to-day store operations.
Generate reports and analytics for sales, inventory, and performance review.
Configure language, localization, and store settings for Arabic-first operations.
Support barcode label printing, promotions, notifications, and delivery integrations from within the app.

features.name: Business Onboarding
features.description: First-time store setup with business type selection and initial store configuration.
user_flows: Navigate to /onboarding -> Select a business type -> Enter store details -> Configure currency and timezone -> Complete onboarding -> See dashboard

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Sign in with email/password or PIN to access the store app.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter email and password -> Submit login form -> See dashboard
Navigate to /login/pin -> Enter PIN -> Submit PIN login -> See dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Enter invalid credentials -> Submit login form -> See validation error

features.name: Cash Shift Management
features.description: Open and close cashier shifts with cash counts and Z-report review.
user_flows: Navigate to /pos/shift/open -> Enter opening cash amount -> Select opening denominations -> Open shift -> Proceed to POS checkout
Navigate to /cash-sessions -> Select an active shift -> Enter closing cash count -> Close shift -> See Z-report totals and discrepancy

features.name: POS Checkout
features.description: Process sales by adding items to a cart, taking payment, and completing the transaction.
user_flows: Navigate to /pos/checkout -> Scan barcode or search for a product -> Add item to cart -> Change quantity or remove an item -> Select payment method -> Enter cash tendered if paying by cash -> Complete sale -> See receipt confirmation
Navigate to /pos/checkout -> Scan barcode or search for a product -> Add item to cart -> Apply a discount -> Enter manager PIN when prompted -> Complete sale -> See receipt confirmation
Navigate to /pos/checkout -> Add items to cart -> Hold the cart -> Reopen the held cart -> Complete sale -> See receipt confirmation

features.name: Order Management
features.description: View and progress incoming POS, delivery, and marketplace orders through their workflow.
user_flows: Navigate to /orders -> View incoming orders by status -> Accept an external order -> Update order status through preparation steps -> See order marked ready or completed
Navigate to /orders -> View an incoming order -> Reject the order -> See the order removed from the active queue

features.name: Product Catalogue Management
features.description: Create, edit, search, import, and organize products for sale.
user_flows: Navigate to /products -> Search or filter the product list -> Open a product form -> Enter product details -> Save the product -> See it in the catalogue
Navigate to /products/add -> Enter product name, SKU, barcode, price, and category -> Add variants or modifier groups -> Save the product -> See the new product in the list
Navigate to /products/import -> Upload a CSV file -> Review the import preview -> Confirm import -> See products added to the catalogue

features.name: Inventory Management
features.description: Monitor stock and perform adjustments, transfers, receipts, purchase orders, stocktakes, and waste tracking.
user_flows: Navigate to /inventory -> Open stock levels -> Review stock by branch -> See low-stock alerts
Navigate to /inventory/stock-adjustments -> Create a stock adjustment -> Enter quantity and reason code -> Save adjustment -> See updated stock movement
Navigate to /inventory/stock-transfers -> Create a transfer between branches -> Submit transfer request -> Track the transfer status -> See the movement logged
Navigate to /inventory/purchase-orders -> Create a purchase order -> Add supplier and items -> Send the order -> See it listed in purchase orders
Navigate to /inventory/goods-receipts -> Open a goods receipt -> Confirm received quantities -> Save receipt -> See stock updated
Navigate to /inventory/stocktakes -> Start a stocktake -> Enter physical counts -> Submit counts -> See adjustments generated
Navigate to /inventory/waste-records -> Log waste or spoilage -> Enter reason and cost -> Save record -> See waste history updated

features.name: Customer Management
features.description: Manage customer profiles, purchase history, loyalty, credit, and customer groups.
user_flows: Navigate to /customers -> Search the customer list -> Open a customer profile -> View purchase history and loyalty balance
Navigate to /customers -> Create a new customer -> Enter name, phone, and email -> Save customer -> See the customer in the list
Navigate to /customers/groups -> Create or edit a customer group -> Save the group -> See the group available for targeted promotions

features.name: Promotions and Coupons
features.description: Create and manage discounts, promotions, and coupon codes.
user_flows: Navigate to /promotions -> Open the promotions list -> Create a new promotion -> Set type, date range, and applicable items -> Save promotion -> See it in the active or scheduled list
Navigate to /promotions -> Create a coupon code -> Choose single-use or multi-use behavior -> Save coupon -> See the coupon generated
Navigate to /promotions -> Toggle a flash sale on or off -> See the promotion state change

features.name: Reports and Analytics
features.description: Review sales and operational reports with charts, tables, and export options.
user_flows: Navigate to /reports -> Select a report type -> Set a date range -> View charts and data table -> Export the report to PDF or Excel
Navigate to /reports/sales-summary -> Choose a reporting period -> Review sales trends and totals -> Export the summary report

features.name: Barcode Label Printing
features.description: Print product labels, shelf labels, and barcodes, or design custom labels.
user_flows: Navigate to /labels -> Select products for labels -> Choose a label template -> Set quantity -> Start batch print -> Receive printed labels
Navigate to /labels/designer -> Design a custom label -> Add branding, product text, price, and barcode -> Save the design -> Export labels as PDF

features.name: Delivery Platform Integrations
features.description: Configure supported delivery platforms, save credentials, and sync menus.
user_flows: Navigate to /delivery -> View supported platforms -> Enable a platform integration -> Save the integration state
Navigate to /delivery/config -> Enter API credentials for a platform -> Save credentials -> See the platform ready for sync
Navigate to /delivery -> Trigger a force sync -> See the sync log update for the platform

features.name: Staff and User Management
features.description: Invite staff, assign roles and branches, and review staff activity.
user_flows: Navigate to /staff/members -> View the staff list -> Invite a new staff member -> Enter phone or email -> Assign a role and branch -> Send invitation -> See the staff member in the list
Navigate to /staff/roles -> Review role definitions -> Update a role assignment for a staff member -> Save changes -> See the updated access configuration
Navigate to /staff/attendance -> Open attendance history -> Review clock-in and shift records -> See staff activity details

features.name: Subscription and Billing
features.description: Review plan status, usage, invoices, and available upgrades.
user_flows: Navigate to /subscription/status -> Review the current plan and usage meters -> See renewal information and monthly price
Navigate to /subscription/plans -> Compare available plans -> Choose an upgrade option -> Confirm upgrade -> See the plan change reflected in status
Navigate to /subscription/billing -> Open invoice history -> Download a PDF invoice -> See the invoice saved locally

features.name: Notifications
features.description: View notifications and adjust read status and notification preferences.
user_flows: Navigate to /notifications -> Open the inbox -> Review unread notifications -> Mark one notification as read -> See the unread badge update
Navigate to /notifications/preferences -> Review channel preferences -> Toggle event notifications on or off -> Save preferences -> See the updated settings

features.name: Settings and Localization
features.description: Configure store settings, receipt text, tax settings, and app localization options.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Open localization settings -> Toggle language between Arabic and English -> See the interface update
Navigate to /settings/localization -> Switch between RTL and LTR -> Change calendar format -> Save preferences -> See the layout and date format change
Navigate to /settings -> Edit VAT or receipt text settings -> Save changes -> See the updated store configuration

features.name: Thawani Marketplace Integration
features.description: Monitor Thawani integration status, sync products, and review marketplace orders.
user_flows: Navigate to /thawani-integration -> Review integration status -> Trigger a product and price sync -> See the sync timestamp update
Navigate to /orders -> View incoming Thawani orders -> Accept an order -> Update its status through fulfillment

features.name: Financial Reconciliation and Daily Summary
features.description: Review cash management and end-of-day finance information.
user_flows: Navigate to /finance/reconciliation -> Review end-of-day totals -> Compare expected and actual values -> Complete reconciliation
Navigate to /finance/daily-summary -> Review the daily accounting summary -> Open payment method breakdown -> See revenue and expense totals

routes.description: Manual stock adjustments with reason codes
Current plan, usage meters, renewal date
Configure delivery platform credentials and toggles
Export to QuickBooks, Xero, Qoyod, CSV
Business type selection and store setup wizard

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Email/password login, PIN login for cashiers, biometric login, session management
user_interactions: Enter email and password then tap Login button
Enter 4-6 digit PIN on PIN login screen
Tap Forgot Password to request reset
See validation error on empty or invalid credentials
Get redirected to dashboard on successful login

features.name: POS Checkout
features.description: Full sales processing - scan/search products, manage cart, apply discounts, collect payment, print receipt
user_interactions: Scan barcode or search product by name/SKU
Add product to cart, change quantity, remove item
Apply discount (amount or %) with optional manager PIN
Select payment method (cash, card, split)
Enter cash tendered and see change calculation
Complete sale and print/send receipt
Hold cart and recall held cart
Process void or return

features.name: Cash Shift Management
features.description: Open shift with opening cash, close shift with Z-report and cash count
user_interactions: Enter opening cash amount
Select denominations for opening count
Open shift and proceed to POS
Close shift and enter closing cash count
View Z-report with cash/card totals and discrepancy

features.name: Product Catalogue Management
features.description: Create, edit, import products with categories, variants, modifiers, pricing, barcodes
user_interactions: Browse product list with search and filter by category
Tap Add Product and fill name (AR/EN), SKU, barcode, price, category
Add product variants (size, colour) and modifier groups
Toggle product availability per branch
Import products via CSV file upload

features.name: Inventory Management
features.description: Stock levels, adjustments, transfers, purchase orders, stocktakes, expiry tracking, waste records
user_interactions: View current stock levels per branch with low-stock alerts
Create stock adjustment with reason code and quantity
Initiate stock transfer between branches
Create and send purchase order to supplier
Receive goods and confirm quantities
Start a stocktake and enter physical counts
Log waste/spoilage with reason and cost

features.name: Order Management
features.description: Unified order screen combining POS orders, delivery platform orders, and Thawani orders with KDS
user_interactions: View all incoming orders with status columns (new, preparing, ready, completed)
Accept or reject incoming external delivery order
Update order status through workflow steps
Print kitchen ticket for an order

features.name: Customer Management
features.description: Customer profiles, loyalty points, store credit, purchase history, customer groups
user_interactions: Search and view customer list
Create new customer with name, phone, email
View customer purchase history and loyalty balance
Adjust store credit balance
Create and manage customer groups

features.name: Promotions and Coupons
features.description: Create and manage discounts, buy-X-get-Y, time-limited promos, coupon codes, bundle pricing
user_interactions: View active and scheduled promotions list
Create promotion with type (%, fixed, buy-X-get-Y, bundle)
Set date range, applicable products/categories
Generate single-use or multi-use coupon codes
Toggle flash sale on/off

features.name: Reports and Analytics
features.description: Sales, inventory, staff performance, payment methods, ZATCA reports with export to PDF/Excel
user_interactions: Select report type from reports hub
Set date range (daily/weekly/monthly/custom)
View charts and data table
Export report to PDF or Excel

features.name: Barcode Label Printing
features.description: Print price tags, shelf labels, and product barcodes including weighable-item and price-embedded formats
user_interactions: Select products to print labels for
Choose label template (price tag, shelf label, barcode)
Set quantity per label and start batch print
Design custom label with logo, AR/EN name, price, barcode
Export labels as PDF for standard printer

features.name: Delivery Platform Integrations
features.description: Connect to HungerStation, Keeta, Jahez, Noon Food and others - manage credentials, sync menus, receive orders
user_interactions: View list of supported delivery platforms
Enable or disable a platform integration toggle
Enter and save API credentials for a platform
View sync log with OK/Error status per sync event
Tap force-sync to push full menu to platform

features.name: Staff and User Management
features.description: Invite staff, assign roles and branches, time clock, shift scheduling, commissions, tips
user_interactions: View staff member list with active/suspended status
Invite new staff member by phone or email
Assign role (Owner, Manager, Cashier, etc.) and branch
View staff attendance and shift history
Configure commission rules per role

features.name: Subscription and Billing
features.description: View current plan, usage meters, upgrade/downgrade, invoice history, add-ons
user_interactions: View current plan name, renewal date, monthly price
View usage meters (cashiers, terminals, products, branches)
Tap Upgrade Plan and compare plans on plan comparison page
View invoice history and download PDF invoice
Purchase add-on (e.g. Thawani integration +100 SAR/mo)

features.name: Notifications
features.description: In-app notification inbox, push/SMS/email preferences, quiet hours, notification bell with badge
user_interactions: Tap notification bell to open dropdown with recent notifications
View full notification inbox with read/unread state
Mark notification as read or mark all as read
Go to notification preferences and toggle channels per event type
Set quiet hours window

features.name: ZATCA e-Invoicing
features.description: Device onboarding (CSR to Production CSID), automatic invoice signing, QR code, compliance log
user_interactions: Run ZATCA device onboarding wizard (CSR generation, OTP, CSID activation)
View ZATCA invoice log with submission status per invoice
Toggle sandbox/production environment
View QR code on printed receipt

features.name: Settings and Localization
features.description: Language toggle (AR/EN), RTL/LTR, Hijri/Gregorian, Arabic-Indic numerals, tax, receipt, store profile
user_interactions: Toggle language between Arabic and English (one tap)
Switch between RTL and LTR layout
Toggle Hijri/Gregorian calendar
Configure VAT rate and tax categories
Edit receipt header and footer text

features.name: Business Onboarding
features.description: First-time store setup with business type selection, store details, and initial configuration
user_interactions: Select business type (Supermarket, Restaurant, Pharmacy, etc.)
Enter store name, address, VAT registration number
Configure initial currency and timezone
Complete onboarding and land on dashboard

features.name: Thawani Marketplace Integration
features.description: Two-way product/price/stock sync with Thawani marketplace, receive and fulfil Thawani orders
user_interactions: View Thawani integration status and last sync time
Manually trigger product/price sync to Thawani
View incoming Thawani orders in unified order screen
Map product categories to Thawani categories

features.name: Admin Panel
features.description: Platform-admin multi-tenant management - stores, subscriptions, users, billing, revenue dashboard
user_interactions: View list of all registered providers/stores
Open store detail and view subscription status
Approve or reject new provider registration
Manage platform-level subscription plans and pricing
View revenue dashboard with MRR, churn, and ARR

known_limitations.issue: This is a Flutter desktop/tablet app, not a browser-based web app. UI tests require a running Flutter app on a device or emulator rather than a web server port.
known_limitations.impact: Standard browser-based frontend testing via localhost port does not apply. Tests must use Flutter integration test runner or be pure Dart unit tests.

known_limitations.issue: POS checkout page requires an active cash session (shift must be opened first) before the cart UI is accessible.
known_limitations.impact: Test flows must open a shift before testing checkout functionality.

known_limitations.issue: ZATCA signing requires a provisioned CSID certificate stored in secure device storage; sandbox mode must be enabled for testing.
known_limitations.impact: ZATCA invoice generation cannot be tested without a valid test CSID or sandbox credentials.

known_limitations.issue: Delivery platform integrations require valid third-party API credentials (HungerStation, Keeta, etc.) for full end-to-end sync tests.
known_limitations.impact: Integration sync tests should use mock credentials and stub webhook responses.

known_limitations.issue: Offline sync tests require SQLite drift database to be initialized; direct API mocking via Dio interceptors is needed for unit/integration tests.
known_limitations.impact: Tests must set up mock Drift DB or use in-memory SQLite.
